title: Communicated
description: A mod which adds many new ways to communicated between players
body:
**This mod is still in alpha phase. There is much more to come... If you have any feedback or ideas please submit it on Github**

## Items

- Letter
  - Is produced when closing an envelope
  - Can be designated to a specific player
  - Has encrypted content
  - Has a title and an author (which can be removed to make the letter anonymous)
- Letter Paper
  - Is used for writing letters
  - Is equivalent to book and quill, but with a maximum of 10 pages
- Envelope
  - Contains a maximum of 3 letter papers
  - Can be closed to create a letter
- Key
  - Is used to open a locked mailbox
- Unused Key
  - Is used for locking a mailbox and duplicating existing keys

## Blocks

- Mailbox
  - Works like a container
  - Has 15 slots
  - Can only hold letters, letter papers and envelopes
  - Emits a comparator signal according to how many slots are filled
  - Drops itself including the contents when dropped
  - Can be locked when crafted together with an Unused Key
